visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a blue and white horizontally striped sleeveless dress and white sneakers, enters a brightly lit indoor space. She is first seen walking past shelves stocked with various packaged goods, then transitions to riding an upward-moving escalator. The setting appears to be a modern shopping mall with polished floors and bright overhead lighting. (2) The woman enters a retail store branded 'STANCAVE'. She is seen interacting with sports apparel, specifically holding up a blue World Baseball Classic (WBC) jersey and a white jersey with a 'CT' logo. She stands near a display table filled with small decorative patches and accessories, gesturing toward the items. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a professional retail environment. (3) She moves to another section labeled 'HOBBY WORLD'. The area is filled with glass display cases containing figurines, toys, and collectible cards. She walks through the aisles, looking at the diverse merchandise, including a wall of anime-style figurines and Pokemon card anniversary sets. Her facial expression is enthusiastic and cheerful. (4) The scene shifts to the 'FLIPPER'S' cafe. The woman is seated at a white table, browsing through a physical menu that showcases colorful photos of pancakes. A female friend in a pink shirt is briefly seen standing and looking at the menu alongside her. The interior features warm wood paneling and stylish pendant lights. (5) A very tall stack of fluffy souffle pancakes topped with whipped cream and fresh strawberries is served. The woman and her friend are shown using forks to take bites of the dessert, showing expressions of enjoyment and delight. Close-ups emphasize the soft, jiggly texture of the pancakes.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: DREAM PLAZA. (2) [Logo]: STANCAVE. (3) [Subtitle]: 哎～～之前那個WBC的周邊. [Variety]: WBC週邊. [Slogan]: 世界經典棒球賽. (4) [Subtitle]: 然後這邊呢主打是讓你可以客製. (5) [Subtitle]: 印你想印的東西. (6) [Subtitle]: 就像你看空白的地方. (7) [Subtitle]: 然後你就可以選你想印的東西把它印上去. (8) [Subtitle]: 就變成專屬你的. (9) [Logo]: HOBBY WORLD. (10) [Subtitle]: 玩具店要來的吧. (11) [Subtitle]: 你要買小朋友玩具也有. (12) [Subtitle]: 大人的收藏也有. (13) [Subtitle]: 來去買爆！！. (14) [Logo]: FLIPPER'S. (15) [Subtitle]: 一生摯愛舒芙蕾鬆餅. (16) [Subtitle]: 就是我不太愛吃甜點但是舒芙蕾鬆餅我可以. (17) [Variety]: 我可以. (18) [Variety]: 超高！！. [Slogan]: 期間限定. (19) [Variety]: 超大 🍓!!. (20) [Variety]: 軟綿綿口感～. (21) [Subtitle]: 真的很好吃.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 female friend at the end, approximately 6 background shoppers and staff across different scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, straight dark hair wearing a blue and white horizontally striped sleeveless midi dress and white sneakers.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves through several distinct indoor environments: a grocery/market area, a sports apparel store (STANCAVE) with clothing racks, a hobby store (HOBBY WORLD) with glass display cases and toy shelves, and a cafe (FLIPPER'S) with wooden decor and white tables.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with an upbeat, rhythmic acoustic guitar track and a light drum beat, establishing a cheerful and energetic mood. The BGM remains consistent throughout the sequence. (2) A female voice begins narrating with high arousal and a bright, friendly tone. She speaks quickly and clearly, expressing enthusiasm about World Baseball Classic merchandise. (3) The vocal delivery continues as she describes customization options for jerseys. The mix focuses heavily on the clear vocal track, with the music sitting comfortably in the mid-background. (4) As the location shifts to the toy store, the narrator's pitch rises slightly, reflecting heightened excitement. The background music maintains its steady tempo, and the spectral brightness is high. (5) In the final phase at the cafe, the narrator's voice exhibits high valence and joy. Subtle sounds of clinking silverware are audible, layered beneath the primary vocal and the persistent upbeat background music.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Entry -> Retail Showcase 1 -> Retail Showcase 2 -> Food Experience -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a day-out experience at DREAM PLAZA, highlighting specific retail attractions like sports apparel and collectible toys, as well as a popular dessert destination.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically names and visits STANCAVE, HOBBY WORLD, and FLIPPER'S, showing products and the experience within these locations while identifying the mall as DREAM PLAZA.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of on-screen text and fast editing to maintain energy, typical of social media travel/lifestyle content.
